category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a userspace Go implementation of WireGuard; official WireGuard repositories page lists wireguard-go as the cross-platform userspace implementation of WireGuard in Go.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is wireguard-go; official WireGuard repository listing and cgit page use wireguard-go.
docs_sources: Official cgit about page documents wireguard-go usage, platforms, and building; official WireGuard site provides repository and compilation documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official WireGuard repositories page lists wireguard-go at git.zx2c4.com, and the official cgit about page shows cloning https://git.zx2c4.com/wireguard-go.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a WireGuard userspace Go implementation; official WireGuard repositories page and cgit about page confirm WireGuard, Go, userspace, and tunnel implementation context.
